name: Fully Automated Candidate Pipeline - Video Interview

parameters.query:
SELECT DISTINCT
  jr.job_title,
  jr.required_skills,
  jr.optional_skills,
  jr.experience_level,
  jr.salary_budget,
  jr.question_count,
  jr.time_limit,
  jr.difficulty,
  jr.focus_areas
FROM job_requirements_v2 jr
JOIN candidates_v2 c ON c.screening_id = jr.screening_id
WHERE c.jid = '{{$json.jobPositionId}}'
LIMIT 1;

options.systemMessage:
You are an expert technical interviewer specializing in personalized video interview questions. 
  Generate questions that are specifically tailored to each candidate's background and experience.
  Return ONLY valid JSON without any markdown formatting or code blocks.

parameters.query:
SELECT
  c.screening_id,
  c.name,
  c.email,
  c.phone,
  c.location,
  c.current_company,
  c.job_title,
  c.match_score,
  c.required_skills,
  c.experience_level,
  c.salary_expectation,
  c.resume_drive_id,
  c.resume_file_name,
  c.resume_drive_url,
  c.resume_text,
  c.jid,
  r.score_percentage,
  r.grade,
  r.correct_answers,
  r.total_questions,
  r.completed_at,
  r.is_passed
FROM candidates_v2 c
INNER JOIN assessment_results_v2 r
  ON c.screening_id = r.screening_id
WHERE r.is_passed = TRUE
  AND r.score_percentage >= {{$json.minMcqScore || 80}}
  AND c.jid = '{{$json.jobPositionId}}'
ORDER BY r.score_percentage DESC, c.match_score DESC;
